reviews.review_description: Graphics horrible,costs 30 bucks but free.And i need to sign up for multiplayer

reviews.review_title: The worst game I ever played on vr
reviews.review_description: Nothing works it is free but also there is only two flags and nether are mine add America don’t play!

They stole $32 bucks from me.  The tools: thermometers,  bp, o2, aka inventory doesn't even work.


Be careful! The game is "free" but I had to pay, to open the other sims.  They didn't work. I wanted a refund, I can't get it.  

This is theft.  Meta won't give a refund, they promote a game that doesn't work, and it's horrible tracking, and movement. No use to it. 

This is not professional. Hopefully the developer will refund me, after not even 20 minutes of play?!? 



Edit: I did the tutorial, as it suggested. I willingly paid for the additional sims, yes.  I did not willingly purchase something that doesn't work. I did, check off the steps, as suggested.  I communicated with the patients. This game/app is lacking, alot. It should tell you, you have to go into a different room, to select the inventory. I did not see that.  

This isn't worth $30. You may want to take a look at it, again. I followed your tutorial. 

I did get a refund wz per Meta, as I was upset about buying a game/app that doesn't work very well/at all. It honestly is boring: you can only track their temp, bp, 02 stats, and yank a blanket off them.  That's about it.  

I won't be re-purchasing to see if your reply is correct.
